headline: Drone Delivery Pilot Serves 12 Rural Clinics in Pahang
context: Health Ministry launched drone delivery pilot in Pahang serving 12 rural clinics with medicine and blood samples in 2025.

cards.big: Drone delivery serves 12 rural Pahang clinics with medicine and blood samples
cards.sub: Pilot covers areas where road access takes 3-4 hours but drone flight is 25 minutes

cards.big: Each drone carries 2.5kg payload sufficient for 1 week of critical medication
cards.sub: System completed 480 deliveries in 6 months with 98% successful delivery rate

cards.big: Cost per delivery of RM85 compares to RM350 for vehicle-based delivery
cards.sub: Pilot saved 3 lives by delivering emergency blood products within 30 minutes

cards.big: Expansion to 45 clinics across 4 states planned for 2027 at RM28 million
cards.sub: Civil Aviation Authority issued special permits for beyond-visual-line-of-sight operations

cards.big: Drone delivery shows whether technology can bypass infrastructure gaps in healthcare access
12 rural clinics served by drone delivery. Remote healthcare logistics need scale, not just pilots.
